overall_score.description: clamp(0.5 + sum(score_delta), 0, 1). Polarity bands: fortified >= 0.70; mixed_or_contextual >= 0.45; weakened >= 0.30; strongly_weakened < 0.30.

accidental_overall_polarity.description: Derived from overall_score: fortified >= 0.70; mixed_or_contextual >= 0.45; weakened >= 0.30; strongly_weakened < 0.30.
